graphql/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot release compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version supporting Java 21.
Set the Java release target to 21 for the compiler plugin.
graphql/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for the wrong JDK version if the release flag is not updated to match the target JDK.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/M.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for URI conversion.

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check and cast in serialize method to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
Refactor instanceof check and cast in parseLiteral method to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.before:

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.after:

            return LocalDateTime.parse(value.getValue(), DateTimeFormatter.ISO_DATE_TIME);

graphql/src/main/java/com/example/demo/g.general_idea: Migrate instanceof check and cast to pattern matching syntax introduced in Java 16.
